name: Glazed Chicken Legs with Cornbread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Kitchen Bouquet or other browning sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stuffing mix according to the package directions.
2. Spoon the prepared stuffing into a baking dish, forming a mound.
3. Remove the skin from the chicken and discard it. Rinse the chicken parts and pat them dry with paper towels.
4. Place the chicken parts (skin-side down) on top of the stuffing in the dish, positioning the thighs next to the sides of the dish and the drumstick ends over the center of the stuffing.
5. Sprinkle the salt and pepper over the chicken.
6. Cover the chicken with wax paper.
7. In a 1-cup glass measure, microwave the currant jelly for 30 seconds or until it melts. Stir in the Kitchen Bouquet; set aside.
8. Microwave the dish on high for 7 minutes, then rotate and continue microwaving for another 7-9 minutes, or until the juices run clear when pierced with a fork.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
